overview.description: Mastercard Incorporated, a technology company, provides transaction processing and other payment-related products and services in the United States and internationally. The company offers products and services for account holders, merchants, financial institutions, digital partners, businesses, governments, and other organizations, such as programs that enable issuers to provide consumers with credits to defer payments; payment products and solutions that allow its customers to access funds in deposit and other accounts; prepaid programs servic...
overview.financialIntro: In 2025, Mastercard's revenue was $32.79 billion, an increase of 16.42% compared to the previous year's $28.17 billion. Earnings were $14.97 billion, an increase of 16.27%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 41 analysts, the average rating for MA stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $643.84, which is an increase of 24.10% from the latest price.

data.title: Mastercard Incorporated to Host Conference Call on Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.text: PURCHASE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--On July 30, 2026, Mastercard (NYSE: MA) will release its second quarter 2026 financial results.

data.title: Mastercard Board of Directors Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.text: PURCHASE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE: MA) today announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of 87 cents per share.

data.title: Mastercard Announces Annual Meeting Results
data.text: PURCHASE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mastercard Incorporated (NYSE:MA) announced the results of its annual meeting of stockholders, held today.

data.title: Mastercard Transcript: AGM 2026
data.text: The meeting covered board elections, executive compensation approval, and the rejection of two shareholder proposals. Financial results showed strong growth in transaction volumes and strategic focus on digital innovation, AI, and stablecoins. Leadership changes were discussed, emphasizing global coordination and future growth.
